content:
🚀 Engineering Update: Just shipped some major improvements!

Our team has been hard at work, and we are thrilled to announce: 'refactor(kestra): migrate execution flows to use Process runners and fix volume mounts'. This release fundamentally changes how we approach edge cases and stability.

A massive shoutout to the engineering team for their relentless dedication. If you're building in the same space, let's connect! 👇

#BuildInPublic #SoftwareEngineering #TechInnovation
